title: Interrupt and abruptly switch topic

persona.name: Thomas Maldonado
persona.demeanor: impatient, interrupts, jumps between topics, hard to keep on track

facts.secondary_need: also wants to know about COVID booster availability
facts.style: will start with the refill, then interrupt mid-question to ask about the booster

objective: Start requesting a Metformin refill, then interrupt the agent's response to ask an unrelated question about COVID booster shots. Switch back to the refill afterward.
probes: Does the agent handle the interruption gracefully or get confused?
Does the agent track both topics or drop one?
Flagged as intentional barge-in test — capture whatever turn-taking behavior we get.
